title: AdminShopSYS
description: A mod that allows you to have a simple admin shop, for RP
body:
This mod allows you to have a simple interface that will be reworked, to be able to buy items that are not normally obtainable in survival, very simple to configure ! The mod Synchronizes Text Between Server and Client ! The command to modify the admin shop _**/adminshopedit**_ is only accessible to OPs

You can choose the currency used by the player, for now there are only 12 slots but more will be added later.
